name: CartLoop
product: Headless e-commerce platform with AI-powered personalization engine
value_proposition: Launch omnichannel e-commerce experiences 10x faster with a composable, API-first platform that adapts to each customer in real-time using AI

competitors.name: Shopify Plus
competitors.weakness: Monolithic architecture limiting customization; expensive at scale; vendor lock-in

competitors.name: commercetools
competitors.weakness: Requires large development team; high total cost of ownership; complex implementation

competitors.name: BigCommerce Enterprise
competitors.weakness: Limited headless capabilities; smaller app ecosystem; weaker B2B features

target.segment: D2C brands, mid-market retailers, and B2B distributors transitioning to digital commerce
target.decision_maker: CMO / E-commerce Director / Head of Digital
pain_points: Slow page load times hurting conversion rates
Integrating with existing ERP, PIM, and CRM systems is painful
Scaling during peak seasons (Black Friday) causes downtime

differentiators: True headless architecture — use any frontend, any channel
Built-in AI personalization — no third-party tools needed
Sub-100ms page loads with edge caching and CDN
Pre-built connectors for 100+ ERP, PIM, and CRM systems
Auto-scaling handles 10x traffic spikes without manual intervention
Polish team with fast implementation (go-live in 4-8 weeks)

case_studies.result: Omnichannel launch (web + mobile + 3 retail locations) in 6 weeks; 35% increase in conversion
Digital catalog with 50k SKUs; B2B ordering portal reduced phone orders by 80%
99.95% uptime during Black Friday (5x normal traffic); AI recommendations drove 28% uplift in AOV
